title: helichrysum reflexum
intro: Helichrysum reflexum, also known as the yellowever or coastal helichrysum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Helichrysum reflexum is said to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and even exhibiting some anti-cancer properties. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its therapeutic benefits.
